case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. THE MISSION MENTAL HEALTH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLENDON, CHERI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A CLAIM AGAINST THE PUBLIC ENTITY DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THIS CLAIM. IT IS NOW TIME BARRED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A CLAIM AGAINST THE PUBLIC ENTITY DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE FILING OF THIS CLAIM. IT IS NOW TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF CHERI MCCLENDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE MISSION MENTAL HEALTH, REPRESENTED BY GRACE CLEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCCLENDON, CHERI AS TO DEFENDANT THE MISSION MENTAL HEALTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
